objects.name: Analytic 1734
objects.description: Correlates (1) application activity that creates, modifies, or accesses local artifacts relevant to detection or device compromise state, (2) subsequent deletion, alteration, renaming, relocation, or visibility suppression of those artifacts, including files, application presence, media, or root-compromise indicators, and (3) continued application execution, reduced telemetry quality, or outbound activity after the artifact state changes. The defender observes a causal chain where host-side evidence is first manipulated and expected visibility or reporting degrades while the initiating application remains active.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:MDMLog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: device posture or compromise-state indicators change unexpectedly, including rooted or non-compliant status disappearance, after prior app or system activity suggesting persistence on device

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:MDMLog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: managed application state changes unexpectedly through uninstall, disappearance from expected inventory, or install-state mismatch after prior suspicious activity

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: application invokes package, settings, or privileged framework operations capable of disabling security software, altering security enforcement, or interfering with reporting before telemetry loss

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Correlation window between artifact change, visibility degradation, and continued execution or network activity
Types of host artifacts monitored for suspicious removal or alteration, such as files, installed-app presence, hidden media, or compromise markers
Baseline sources expected to continue reflecting artifacts or compromise state
Threshold defining abnormal loss of artifact visibility or reporting continuity
Legitimate apps expected to delete or alter artifacts as part of normal lifecycle or cleanup behavior
Outbound traffic threshold used to confirm meaningful activity after indicator removal
